description: Critical review fixes: CSRF cookie Secure flag + first-request bypass, Meta webhook fail-closed in production, job queue row-claim race, Zod validators proper types, data export row cap, pagination server-side default cap, booking conflict transaction
steps: 1. CSRF cookie: add Secure flag and fix first-request bypass
2. Meta webhook: fail-closed in production when META_APP_SECRET is not set
3. Job queue: atomic row claim with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
4. Zod validators: replace z.any() with proper types
5. Data export: add 10k row cap with truncation indicator
6. Pagination: add server-side default .limit(1000) on non-paginated path
7. Booking conflict: wrap check+insert in transaction
acceptance_criteria: CSRF cookie includes secure: true in production
First POST/PATCH/DELETE without csrf_token cookie returns 403
Meta webhook returns 503 when META_APP_SECRET unset in production
Zod validators reject invalid types (e.g. name: 42)
Booking conflict check+insert wrapped in db.transaction()
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
Run npx vitest run --config vitest.config.server.ts to verify tests pass
